advancements.oritech.begin.description: Nickel & Dime - Finde rohes Nickel, um dein technologisches Abenteuer zu beginnen. Shine on, you crazy miner!
advancements.oritech.generator.descripti: Produziere einge Menge Energie mit einem einfachen Generator. Elektrifizierend, oder nicht?
advancements.oritech.furnace.description: Hole einen Ofen. Es wird jetzt heißer!
advancements.oritech.pulverizer.descript: Bekomme einen pulverizer und verwandle deine Erze zu Staub! Rock 'n' roll!
advancements.oritech.foundry.description: Erhalte eine foundry und beginne mächtige Legierungen herzustellen. Alchemy at its finest!
advancements.oritech.assembler.descripti: Erhalte einen assembler und beginne Sachen zusammen zu bauen. Es baut sich jetzt alles zusammen!
advancements.oritech.exo_boots.descripti: Stelle Exo Boots her und sag' tschüss zu Fallschaden. Gravitation? Noch nie davon gehört!
advancements.oritech.exo_legs.descriptio: Stelle eine Exo Leggings her und sei deiner Konkurenz einen Schritt voraus. Stärker, schneller, besser!
advancements.oritech.exo_chest.descripti: Stelle eine Exo Brustplatte her und schütze dein Innerstes. Wer? Iron Man?
advancements.oritech.exo_helmet.descript: Stelle einen Exo Helm her. Kopf über Fuß!
advancements.oritech.drill.description: Erhalte einen Handbohrer und beginne durch die Erde zu bohren. Buddle tiefer, Soldat!
advancements.oritech.resource_node.descr: Finde eine resource node. Unendlicher Reichtum erwartet dich!
advancements.oritech.centrifuge.descript: Erhalte eine Zentrifuge und trenne gut von schlecht. Dreh und gewinn!
advancements.oritech.plastic.description: Erhalte eine Plastik Platte. Es ist nicht nur fantastisch, sondern auch plastik!
advancements.oritech.catalyst.descriptio: Erhalte einen Arcane Stabilizer (Warnung: Könnte Seelen enthalten!)
advancements.oritech.overenchanted.descr: Erhalte einen Gegenstand mit einer Level X Verzauberung. Welche Explosionen?
advancements.oritech.laser.description: Erhalte einen Laserarm-block. Starte durch, baue Fluxite ab, und grabe durch die Erde. Pew pew, du bist unaufhaltsam!
advancements.oritech.fluxite.description: Erhalte ein wenig Fluxite. Great Scott, we're going back to the future!
advancements.oritech.augmenter.descripti: Enhance your natural… limitations! Warning: May cause increased desire to say 'beep boop'.
advancements.oritech.reactor.description: Build a nuclear reactor. Remember, safety first! Or, you know... just enjoy the light show.
advancements.oritech.atomicforge.descrip: Erhalte eine Atom Schmiede und beginne Dinge professionel herzustellen!
advancements.oritech.promethium.descript: Erhalte einen Promethium Barren. Du hast den Göttern das Feuer gestohlen!
advancements.oritech.ultimate_core.descr: Erhalte einen ultimativen Kern. Jetzt kannst du exessiv Add-Ons hinzufügen!
advancements.oritech.gold_gem.descriptio: Erlerne das Geheimnis, wie man Gold zu noch mehr Gold macht!
advancements.oritech.ai.description: Erhalte einen super KI Chip. Skynet wer? Es ist nicht nur schlau, es ist genial!
advancements.oritech.unholy.description: Erhalte eine unheilige Intelligenz. Wissen ist macht, aber das hier ist 'was ganz anderes!
advancements.oritech.steam_engine.descri: Nutze die Kraft des Dampfes! Du hast Wasser in Energie verwandelt – jetzt hoffen wir, dass es nicht zu einem großen Chaos wird!
oritech.text.augment.hpboost.desc: Integrates a durable framework, enhancing your body's resilience.
oritech.text.augment.hpboostmore.desc: Reinforces respiratory systems with carbon fibers for increased stamina.
oritech.text.augment.hpboostultra.desc: Overclocks biological systems with redundant nano-machines.
oritech.text.augment.hpboostultimate.des: Fuses organic tissue with liquid metal for unparalleled endurance.
oritech.text.augment.speedboost.desc: Interlaces synthetic muscle fibers for smoother, more powerful strides.
oritech.text.augment.superspeedboost.des: Charges leg actuators with quantum energy for instantaneous bursts.
Adds a massive movement speed boost.
oritech.text.augment.stepassist.desc: Modifies leg hydraulics to automatically adjust for obstacles.
oritech.text.augment.dwarf.desc: Permanently shrinks the player by replacing vital organs with micro-electronic ones.
oritech.text.augment.giant.desc: Overdrives growth hormones using unstable nano-serum.
oritech.text.augment.armor.desc: Layers hardened alloy plates beneath the skin.
oritech.text.augment.betterarmor.desc: Deploys energy-diffusing matrices around vital organs.
oritech.text.augment.ultimatearmor.desc: Projects a forcefield woven from spatial anomalies.
oritech.text.augment.weaponreach.desc: Extends melee weapons range with energy-enhanced actuators.
oritech.text.augment.weaponreach.desc.1: Increases attack reach by 30% of base value.
oritech.text.augment.blockreach.desc: Enhances arm joints with telescoping actuators.
oritech.text.augment.farblockreach.desc: Uses holographic arms for distant manipulation.
oritech.text.augment.miningspeed.desc: Vibrates tools at resonant frequencies for faster excavation.
oritech.text.augment.miningspeed.desc.1: Increases mining speed by 50% of total value.
oritech.text.augment.superminingspeed.de: Boosts mining speed by a massive amount.
oritech.text.augment.superattackdamage.d: Channels psionic energy into devastating kinetic strikes.
oritech.text.augment.luck.desc: Alters probability fields through quantum entanglement.
oritech.text.augment.luck.desc.1: Adds additional luck in all loot-table rolls.
oritech.text.augment.luck.desc.2: This includes all loot-relevant actions, such as loot chests and block drops.
oritech.text.augment.gravity.desc: Counters planetary pull with anti-gravitational nodes.
oritech.text.augment.flight.desc: Deploys anti-gravitational thrusters integrated into the spinal column.
oritech.text.augment.cloak.desc: Bends light around the body using quantum-refractive panels.
oritech.text.augment.portal.desc: Charges an integrated wormhole generator with station coordinates.
oritech.text.augment.portal.desc.1: Creates return portal to enhancement station.
oritech.text.augment.waterbreath.desc: Installs electrolytic gill systems in pulmonary tissue.
oritech.text.augment.autofeeder.desc: Deploys nanobots to optimize nutrient intake from inventory.
oritech.text.augment.autofeeder.desc.1: Automatically feeds the player with food from the inventory, with a higher efficiency.
oritech.text.augment.magnet.desc.1: Pulls nearby items towards the player.
tooltip.oritech.input_mode_fill_left_to_: Füllt slots von links nach Rechts. Fülled den nächsten Slot, wen der vorherige gefüllt wurde.
tooltip.oritech.input_mode_fill_evenly: Befüllt Dinge gleichmäßig. Neue Gegenstände werden an den niedrigesten noch passenden Platz getan.
tooltip.oritech.oracle_missing: Oracle Index Wiki Mod is not installed. Ingame help is not available.
tooltip.oritech.oracle_available: Open the corresponding help page in the Oracle Index.
tooltip.oritech.unstable_container.1: Used to contain and transform a dangerous block. Right-click a target block with this item in hand, and
tooltip.oritech.unstable_container.2: it'll capture the block as core of a large multiblock energy storage.
tooltip.oritech.unstable_container.3: Stabilizing it with enderic lasers will exponentially increase the amount of energy it can store.
tooltip.oritech.unstable_container.5: Outputs RF at the top and bottom, insertion is done from the sides.
tooltip.oritech.needs_laser_power: Muss durch einen Ender Laser mit Leistung versorgt werden.
tooltip.oritech.steam_engine: Processes steam into RF and water. Can be chained together by
tooltip.oritech.steam_engine.1: building multiple in a line. Only the first engine needs to be
tooltip.oritech.steam_engine.2: interacted with (e.g. input steam only to the first engine).
tooltip.oritech.item_filter: Filtert, was rein getan werden kann.
tooltip.oritech.item_filter_ftb: Also supports filters from the FTB Filters mod.
tooltip.oritech.machine_frame: Yes there is a config option to change the bounding box of this.
tooltip.oritech.particle_collector: Collects the energy of tachyons emitted by particle collisions.
tooltip.oritech.augment_research_station: Is built on research station slots, similar to addon slots.
tooltip.oritech.augmenter.1: Used for cybernetic augmentations. Can be used to install and remove augments.
oritech.text.augment_toggle: Release while hovering over an augment to toggle.
tooltip.oritech.chambers:
Each extra processing chamber means that the machine will
process X additional items each cycle.
tooltip.oritech.item_filter.whitelist:
Lässt nur durch, was gleich dem aufgelisteteten 
ist.
tooltip.oritech.item_filter.blacklist:
Lässt alles durch, was nicht zu dem passt, 
was aufgelistet ist.
tooltip.oritech.item_filter.nbt: Currently checks the listed items for custom NBT Data
tooltip.oritech.item_filter.no_component: Currently ignores all item data components, such as enchantments, energy, etc.
tooltip.oritech.item_filter.component: Currently checks the listed items for all data component values
tooltip.oritech.enchanter: Verzaubert mit Hilfe von Energie und Seelen von nahen Catalysatoren.
tooltip.oritech.catalyst: Speichert seelen von Gestalten, die hier starben. Kann Verzauberungen von Büchern übertragen.
tooltip.oritech.catalyst_warning: Warnung: Mit dem Unbekannten zu spielen kann gefährliche Folgen haben.
tooltip.oritech.spawner_cage: Kann benutzt werden um einen Käfig unter einem Spawner controller zu bauen.
tooltip.oritech.spawner: Fängt das erste Wesen, das über ihn läuft, in einem Käfig unter sich.
tooltip.oritech.spawner2: Sammelt und nutzt die Seelen nah verstorbener Kreaturen.
tooltip.oritech.soul_crop: Wächst auf Seelenerde. Enthält eine Seele.
tooltip.oritech.superconductor: Kann nicht mit normalen Energieleitungen verbunden werden.
tooltip.oritech.jetpack_usage: Braucht Strom oder Turbofuel zum fliegen.
tooltip.oritech.charger: Genutzt zum laden und Füllen von Gegenständen.
tooltip.oritech.addon_yield_desc: Doubles byproduct amount in Fragment Forge. Increases block breaking yield in Block Destroyer and Enderic Laser.
tooltip.oritech.addon_silk_touch_desc: Applicable Silk Touch on Destroyer and Enderic Laser.
tooltip.oritech.processing_addon_desc: Allows an additional recipe instance to be processed per cycle.
tooltip.oritech.addon_fluid_desc: Allows fluid processing. Applicable to centrifuge and drone port.
tooltip.oritech.addon_burst_desc: Allows the machine to operate in very fast bursts. Applicable to processing machines.
tooltip.oritech.addon_acceptor_desc: Allows energy to be inserted to the addon instead of the machine itself.
tooltip.oritech.addon_crop_desc: Anwendbar auf Blockzerstörer und Enderischer Laser. Skips non-grown crops or animals
tooltip.oritech.addon_proxy_desc: Erlaubt Zugang zu speziellen Inventar Slots
tooltip.oritech.addon_quarry_desc: Applicable to block destroyer and Enderic Laser. Increases working area size.
tooltip.oritech.addon_hunter_desc: Anwendbar auf Enderischer Laser. Targets living entities
tooltip.oritech.addon_redstone_desc: Allows further redstone und comparator configuration
tooltip.oritech.addon_extender_desc: Erlaubt es mehr Add-Ons zu verbinden.
tooltip.oritech.addon_boiler_desc: Allows a generator to produce steam instead of RF. Input water at this addon, und extract steam from it
tooltip.oritech.overchargedcrystal: Unending amounts of raw Energie seem to be contained within it.
tooltip.oritech.fluxite: Can also be created by harvesting grown amethyst with an Enderischer Laser
tooltip.oritech.promethium_axe: Ducke während des Abbauens, um den ganzen Baum zu fällen
tooltip.oritech.promethium_pick: Shift + rechts-click um den Modus zu wächseln
tooltip.oritech.frame_needed: Muss auf einem Maschninen-Rahmen gebaut werden
tooltip.oritech.refinery_block: Can have up to 2 refinery tank chambers on top of it.
tooltip.oritech.refinery_module: Up to 2 of these can be placed on top of a refinery.
tooltip.oritech.black_hole: Platziere das hier nur, wenn du weißt, was du tust!!!
tooltip.oritech.reactor_controller: Control piece of the variable-sized reactor multiblock.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_controller.0: Must be placed on the reactor walls, and is used to assemble the reactor.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_controller.1: Interior layers need to be identical in the Y-Axis.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_controller.3: WARNING: Insufficient cooling of a reactor may result in catastrophic
tooltip.oritech.reactor_controller.4: consequences. Always follow proper safety procedures when operating
tooltip.oritech.reactor_wall: Durable plating for the outer layer of the nuclear reactor.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_rod: The core of your reactor. Must be placed inside a reactor, with a fuel port on top.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_rod.1: Heat generated from this component can be removed with heat pipes, absorbers or
tooltip.oritech.reactor_double_rod: The core of your reactor. Must be placed inside a reactor, with a fuel port on top.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_double_rod.1: Heat generated from this component can be removed with heat pipes, absorbers or
tooltip.oritech.reactor_quad_rod: The core of your reactor. Must be placed inside a reactor, with a fuel port on top.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_quad_rod.1: Heat generated from this component can be removed with heat pipes, absorbers or
tooltip.oritech.reactor_vent: Removes heat from the hottest neighboring component.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_vent.1: Max heat removal amount is calculated as follows:
tooltip.oritech.reactor_reflector: Increases the efficiency of nearby reactor rods.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_condenser: Absorbs 16 heat/t from ALL neighboring components.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_fuel_port: This is where fuel is supplied to reactor rods.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_fuel_port.1: Needs to be placed on the reactor shell over
tooltip.oritech.electric_mace: Unleashes a small lightning storm when attacking. Works similar to a normal mace.
tooltip.oritech.electric_mace.1: Maces deal increased damage when attacking while falling from a great height.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_absorber_port: This is where coolant is supplied to reactor heat absorbers.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_absorber_port.1: Needs to be placed on the reactor shell over
tooltip.oritech.reactor_energy_port: Outputs the energy of the reactor.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_redstone_port: Allows the reactor to be controlled via redstone, and can be read with a comparator.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_redstone_port.1: A redstone signal to this block will disable the INSERTION of new fuel. Already consumed fuel
tooltip.oritech.reactor_redstone_port.2: pellets still need to be burned before the reactor shuts off.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_redstone_port.3: Has different output modes, where either the energy, heat or energy amount can be read from a comparator.
tooltip.oritech.reactor_redstone_port.4: Right-Click the block to change output modes.
tooltip.oritech.weed_killer: Removes all grass und plants in a wide radius
tooltip.oritech.cooler_block: Works twice as fast (and efficient) in cold biomes.
tooltip.oritech.motor: Right click an item pipe extraction interface to upgrade it to extract from all slots.
tooltip.oritech.portable_laser.1: Left mouse fires a continous beam that can transfer energy, mine blocks, damage
tooltip.oritech.portable_laser.2: entities and transform mined items similar to an enderic laser.
tooltip.oritech.portable_laser.5: Works with most pickaxe enchantments, unbreaking, and sharpness.
tooltip.oritech.portable_laser.status.sh: No shot fired, mining mode is enabled.

tooltip.oritech.capture_item_desc_1.text: Kann das Gehirn eines kleinen, magischen, fliegenden Wesens. Dem

tooltip.oritech.intelligence_item.text: Erhalten durch das Fangen eines passenden Wesens mit dem

tooltip.oritech.capture_item_desc_2.text: könnte zur Beschreibung passen. Obwohl, sie wollen immer den Gegenstand mitnehmen

tooltip.oritech.capture_item_desc_3.text: Von dir. Vielleicht findest du ja eine ähnliche Kreatur zum Fangen.

tooltip.oritech.redstone_output_active: Comparators werden messen, ob die Maschine arbeitet
tooltip.oritech.redstone_input_control: Schaltet ein, dass die Maschine über ein Redstonesignal auf dieses Add-On ein oder aus geschaltet werden kann
tooltip.oritech.laser_arm_block.extra: Can also be built on walls and ceilings.
tooltip.oritech.machine.addon_fortune: Ertrags-Add-On Anzahl. 3 ist das effektive Maximum
tooltip.oritech.machine.addon_silk_touch: When Silk Touch addon and Fortune Addon are installed at the same time, Silk Touch takes priority.
tooltip.oritech.machine.quality:
Machine Quality: %d

Controls how many machine
addons can be added to this block.

Use better cores to increase this.

Current quality progress: %s
tooltip.oritech.steam_workers: Chained steam generators will share/use the steam and water tank of this block.
tooltip.oritech.steam_production: Menge an Dampftropfen, die pro Tick produziert werden. Überfluss geht verloren, wenn der Speicher voll ist.
tooltip.oritech.steam_consumption: Gesamter Dampf Verbrauch (in Tropfen) pro Tick (beinhaltet verbundene Generatoren)
tooltip.oritech.refinery_module_count:
Two extra chamber tank modules can be built on top to unlock the respective tanks.
Having no modules doubles the item and first slow output.
Having one module double the second tank output only. Having two modules enables all outputs.
tooltip.oritech.pipe_booster: Increases the extraction speed of a fluid/item pipe behind it
tooltip.oritech.redstone_disabled.toolti: This machine has been disabled with an active redstone signal.
tooltip.oritech.redstone_disabled_storag: Will not output power while disabled with a redstone signal
tooltip.oritech.redstone_enabled.tooltip:
This machine is operating as normal.
Disable with with a redstone signal to the redstone addon
This machine is operating as normal.
Disable with with a redstone signal to this block or the addon
tooltip.oritech.accelerator_motor: Nutzt Energie zum beschleunigen von Partikeln, die durch es fliegen.
tooltip.oritech.accelerator_ring: Wird genutzt um den Weg eines Partikels zu definieren. Ein Rechtsklick dreht ein Ende. Redstone-kontrollierbar.
tooltip.oritech.accelerator_sensor: Emmitiert ein Redstonesignal, basierend auf der Geschwindigkeit des Partikels, welcher durch es fliegt.
title.oritech.burst.throttled.tooltip: Burst was too long, overheated. Machine is throttled and needs to cool down (offset: %s).
title.oritech.burst.active.tooltip: Burst is actively being used. Remaining: %s ticks.
title.oritech.burst.ready.tooltip: Burst is ready to be used (for %s ticks).
tooltip.oritech.pump_redstone: Can be disabled with a redstone signal.
tooltip.oritech.item_pipe.2: Only extracts from the first non-empty slot.
tooltip.oritech.item_pipe.3: to upgrade the pipe to extract from all slots.
tooltip.oritech.item_pipe.4: Deposits into the closest available inventory.
Yield addon is installed. Byproducts are doubled.
title.oritech.energy.inAvgSecond.tooltip: Average RF/t input over the last second.
title.oritech.energy.inLastTick.tooltip: Total amount of RF received in the last game tick.
title.oritech.energy.inSources.tooltip:
Number of RF insertion events in the last tick
(e.g. the number of machines/blocks sending energy to this block).
title.oritech.energy.inPeak.tooltip: Highest RF/t received in the last second.
title.oritech.energy.outAvgSecond.toolti: Average RF/t output over the last second.
title.oritech.energy.outLastTick.tooltip: Amount of RF that was extracted from this block in the last tick.
title.oritech.energy.outPeak.tooltip: Maximum RF/t that was extracted in the last second.
tooltip.oritech.combi_addon_desc: Only works if it is the first and only applied addon.
tooltip.oritech.shrinker_action: Result will have the following abilities:
tooltip.oritech.machine_core_block: Better cores only allow more addon extenders to be connected.
tooltip.oritech.creative_tank: Rechts-Click mit einem Eimer zum einstellen oder mit einem leeren zum leeren
tooltip.oritech.fuel_generator_block.ext: Outputs energy only at the visual connector ports.
block.oritech.low_yield_nuke.tooltip: Handle with extreme caution: Small but mighty!
block.oritech.low_yield_nuke.tooltip.2: Perfect for those who prefer a subtle touch of devastation.
block.oritech.nuke.tooltip.2: Only for those who wish to leave a lasting impression... or crater.
message.oritech.steamengine.controller_l: Steam engine is chained to main engine (see highlighted block). Use only the main engine.
message.oritech.deep_drill.ore_placement: Maschine muss auf Erz Knoten platziert werden
message.oritech.machine.missing_core: Machine ist nicht zusammengesetzt. Bitte füge fehlende Maschninenkern-Blöcke hinzu
message.oritech.machine_frame.missing_fr: Fehlender Rahmen. Füge einen leeren Eckigen Rahmen hinter der Maschine mit Maschnin-Rahmen Blöcken hinzu
message.oritech.drone.invalid_distance:
Ziel muss 50 Blöcke weg sein.
(Momentane Distanz: %d)
message.oritech.drone.target_set:
Zielhafen gesetzt.
Drone wird Liefern, sofern das Inventar nicht leer ist.
message.oritech.drone.target_invalid:
Target is not a valid drone port.
Ensure that the target port is loaded und active.
message.oritech.pump.initializing: Initialisiere Pumpe ... (Das könnte ein bischen dauern, jeh nach Menge an Flüssigkeit)
message.oritech.spawner.no_mob: Keine Wesenzahl. Bewege ein Wesen auf den Spawner zum laden
message.oritech.target_designator.positi: Nicht passende Position für Dronenhafen, Zielhafen muss mindestens 50 Blöcke weg sein
tooltip.oritech.pipe_duct_warning: Only connects to pipes, not machines.
tooltip.oritech.unstable_laser_tooltip: Lasers will not add to the capacity of this machine. Instead, they'll increase the
tooltip.oritech.unstable_laser_tooltip.2: storage capacity of this block. This number increases exponentially (maximum x5000).
tooltip.oritech.unstable_contained_toolt: Capability multiplier of the block. More dangerous blocks = better.
message.oritech.reactor_edge_invalid: Invalid: Reactor Wall edges need to be rectangular
message.oritech.reactor_wall_invalid: Invalid: Reactor Walls need to be made of reactor-compatible blocks (e.g. reactor walls, ports, controllers)
message.oritech.reactor_interior_issues: Invalid: Reactor Interior Components to be identical on all Y-Layers, and need corresponding ports on top
text.oritech.reactor.cooldown: Reactor has overheated, and needs up to 2 minutes to stabilize
text.oritech.accelerator.ui.nogate.more:
Gate needs to be
pointed to the side
text.oritech.accelerator.ui.accelerating:
Max Gate Dist: %s
Min Curve Dist: %s
text.oritech.accelerator.ui.exited.stats:
Coordinates %s
Last Curve Dist: %s
Min Curve Dist: %s
text.oritech.accelerator.ui.exited.nogat:
Coordinates %s
No gate in range
Range: %s
text.oritech.load_augments.tooltip: Load existing player Augments into the Machine
text.oritech.unstable_container_blocked: Unable to place, area is obstructed.
text.oritech.augmenter_creative_tooltip: In creative mode, you can research / apply augments without needing the resources to be present.
text.config.oritech-config.title: Oritech Settings
text.config.oritech-config.option.genera: Fluid ID for the steam produced by the steam boiler. Only this is accepted by steam engines.
Applies to generators with the steam addon. How many droplets of steam will be produced per the usual RF
Energy Per Steam Unit (in the steam engine)
When enabled, the steam engine will stop working when the water tank is full. It needs to be pumped out to function.
When enabled, the steam engine will stop working when the energy storage is full.
text.config.oritech-config.option.additi: Whether addon bonuses are added additive or multiplicative.
text.config.oritech-config.option.blockB: Block breaking hardness exponential scaling factor
Applies to the destroyer block and enderic laser. Lower = hardness has a lower effect on speed.
text.config.oritech-config.option.layere: When enabled, the machine core quality determines how many layers of machine extenders can be used. If false, its just directly the amount.
text.config.oritech-config.option.genera: This setting only works on fabric. On Neoforge, a datapack is required because NF is annoying.
text.config.oritech-config.option.electr: Electric Mace Lightning Attack RF Usage Factor
text.config.oritech-config.option.safeMo:
With safe mode enabled, the reactor will only enter a cooldown period instead
of exploding when overheated.
text.config.oritech-config.option.reacto: Maximum Energy Output in RF/t per Energy Port
text.config.oritech-config.option.cataly: RF/t pro Katalysator Seelen Kapazität Level Erhöhung
Additional Catalyst Hyper Enchanting Cost Multiplier
Exponential Factor for the hyper enchanting cost. Increase this carefully. This makes higher levels MUCH more expensive.
text.config.oritech-config.option.easyFi: Makes oil wells und bedrock ore nodes easier to find.Oil wells will include a small fountain, und ore nodes a small boulder on the surface
text.config.oritech-config.option.enable: Enable help button in machine UIs
text.config.oritech-config.option.blackH: Energy of Tachyons from Black Holes
text.config.oritech-config.option.unstab: Unstable Container Base RF Storage Capacity
